napHours.heading: Visit Spa Paradise
napHours.note: Free parking on-site. A short drive from downtown Middletown and Route 17 / I-84.

contactForm.heading: Send us a message
contactForm.successMessage: Thanks — we'll reply within one business hour. For the fastest booking, use Book Now.

seo.title: Contact & Hours | Spa Paradise Middletown, NY
seo.description: Spa Paradise — 12 Grove St, Middletown, NY 10940. Call (845) 800-6600. Open every day 9am–9pm. Directions, parking, and contact form.
